name: Yinfu Gold Corp.
summary: Corporate Overview Yinfu Gold Corporation (the Company) is a Wyoming corporation incorporated on September 1, 2005, as a for-profit company, and has a fiscal year end of March 31. The Companys business office is located at Suite 2313, Dongfang Science and Technology Mansion, Nanshan District, Shenzhen, China 518000. The telephone number is (86)755-8316-0998.
